exhibitors.name: ActivityTimeline by Reliex
exhibitors.description:
ActivityTimeline by Reliex
ActivityTimeline is a comprehensive resource planning and time tracking application built for Jira. We provide apps that extend the capabilities of Jira, helping teams visualize project timelines, manage resources effectively, and track time with precision.
What We Offer:
As Gold Atlassian Marketplace Partner, we deliver powerful solutions that enhance Jira's native functionality. Our flagship app enables organizations to transform their project management approach through integrated capacity planning, resource scheduling, and advanced reporting capabilities.
Key Capabilities:
Resource planning and capacity management within JiraIndividual and team-level time trackingCustomizable timesheet reports and resource utilization analyticsTeam scheduling with workload indicatorsSkills-based resource allocationForecasting and planning tools
Our Commitment:
With over 5,000 teams worldwide trusting our solutions — we are dedicated to customer success and continuous innovation. ActivityTimeline is Cloud Fortified, SOC 2 certified, and ISO 27001:2022 certified, ensuring your data remains secure and protected.
We specialize in helping teams gain full visibility into who is doing what and when work will be completed, empowering better decision-making and more efficient project delivery.

ANB Technologies is a global Atlassian consulting and services firm headquartered in the NY/NJ area, helping organizations simplify, digitalize, and automate enterprise processes. As an Atlassian Gold Solution Partner and ITSM Specialized Partner, we enable teams to work smarter, improve service delivery, and accelerate business outcomes through the Atlassian platform.
Our certified experts bring deep experience across IT Service Management, enterprise agility, and modern ways of working. With strong foundations in ITIL, DevOps, and SAFe™, we help organizations align technology, process, and people, ensuring sustainable improvements that drive efficiency, productivity, and measurable results.

Strategic AdvisoryWe partner with you to design tailored strategies that optimize IT, HR, and Agile/DevOps operations, ensuring your Atlassian investments align with your business goals.

exhibitors.name: BrowserStack Inc.
exhibitors.description:
BrowserStack is a comprehensive test platform for web and mobile applications, with AI agents embedded at every stage of the testing lifecycle. It helps developers and QA teams plan, create, execute, and validate tests, so they can deliver high-quality software faster and with greater confidence.
The platform brings together functional and non-functional testing in one place, including automation, low-code testing, visual testing, performance, accessibility, test management, and reporting.
Trusted by over 50,000 teams worldwide, including Amazon, Microsoft, and NVIDIA, BrowserStack runs more than three million tests every day across 21 global data centers, with instant access to over 30,000 real devices and browsers.
Founded in 2011, BrowserStack is a privately held company backed by Accel, Bond, and Insight Partners. Learn more at browserstack.com

exhibitors.name: Clovity
exhibitors.description:
Clovity is a US-based Atlassian Platinum Solution Partner and a trusted leader in helping public sector organizations, federal agencies, and large enterprises modernize mission-critical operations. With a strong focus on government and regulated industries, Clovity enables improved service delivery, governance, compliance, and operational efficiency through secure, scalable, Atlassian-powered solutions.
Clovity delivers AI-powered process transformation through practical, use-case-driven innovation that helps organizations modernize, scale, and optimize complex workflows. By leveraging enterprise-ready emerging technologies, Clovity enhances efficiency, collaboration, transparency, and data-driven decision-making, particularly within highly regulated environments.
With Atlassian at the core of its transformation strategy, Clovity specializes in Enterprise Service Management (ESM), workflow modernization, DevSecOps, and CI/CD optimization. Its comprehensive portfolio spans AI-driven workforce solutions, enterprise workflow management, cloud services, and data analytics, combining deep public sector expertise with advanced technical capabilities to deliver secure, compliant, and future-ready solutions at scale.
A five-time Inc. 5000 honoree (2021–2025) and Great Place to Work® certified, Clovity is recognized by leading industry bodies for innovation and sustained growth. As a minority-owned business with a strong commitment to diversity and inclusion, Clovity continues to drive meaningful, large-scale digital transformation across both public and private sectors.

exhibitors.description:
Rewind is the leading data protection platform for Atlassian Cloud.
As an Atlassian Platinum Marketplace Partner and Cloud Fortified app, Rewind helps teams protect critical Jira, Confluence, and DevOps data from accidental deletion, outages, and security incidents.
Rewind provides automated, daily backups with fast, granular recovery—so teams can restore exactly what they need without disrupting their entire environment. With support for long-term data retention, compliance requirements, and multi-platform DevOps tools, Rewind gives IT and Atlassian admins confidence that their data is always recoverable.
Trusted by thousands of Atlassian customers, Rewind installs in minutes and works seamlessly alongside Atlassian Cloud to help teams move fast—without risking their data.
